title: Budgets, Interest, Loans, and Financial Decisions · Spiral Review
summary: Compare household plans, emergency savings, credit costs, and loan offers without hiding assumptions. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for an explainable household decision model after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Classify fixed, variable, periodic, and discretionary cash flows in a time-aligned budget.
Calculate simple interest and distinguish principal, rate, and time units.
Model compound growth by period and distinguish nominal from effective change.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-beginner cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper

# Add one tested model increment per activity.
